response.step_by_step_log:
1. Identified three songs from on-screen text.
2. Song 1: "丸の内サディスティック" (Marunouchi Sadistic) by Ringo Sheena. Search: "丸の内サディスティック" Ringo Sheena Japanese and English lyrics.
3. Song 2: "ツッパリHigh School Rock'n Roll(登校編)" by Yokohama Ginbae. Search: "ツッパリHigh School Rock'n Roll" Yokohama Ginbae Japanese and English lyrics.
4. Song 3: "バレる!" by Creepy Nuts. Search: "バレる!" Creepy Nuts lyrics.
5. Successfully resolved all metadata and lyrics.
response.global_summary: A 3-song concert segment from Mori Calliope's Birthday Celebration 2025 featuring various VTubers performing popular Japanese songs: "Marunouchi Sadistic", "Tsuppari High School Rock'n Roll(Toukou-hen)", and "Bareru!".

scenes.description: VTuber performs 'Marunouchi Sadistic' on stage. Song title appears in top-left corner.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
報酬は入社後並行線で
東京は愛せど何にも無い
リッケン620頂戴
19万も持って居ない
御茶ノ水
マーシャルの匂いで飛んじゃって大変さ
毎晩絶頂に達して居るだけ
ラット1つを商売道具にしているさ
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
The reward after joining the company is a parallel line.
I love Tokyo but I have nothing here
Give me a Rickenbacker 620
I don't even have 190,000 yen
Ochanomizu
The smell of Marshall gives me a high, which is trouble
I'm just reaching climax every night
I'm using just one Rat as my trade tool
